old_value: {"id":"hyperopen-7wl","title":"Action/effect registration and contract metadata unification","description":"Refactor runtime registration so action/effect IDs, handler keys, collaborator wiring, registry composition, and contract args metadata derive from one canonical catalog. This removes current multi-file fan-out across runtime/collaborators.cljs, runtime/registry_composition.cljs, registry/runtime.cljs, and schema/contracts.cljs for each action/effect change.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"thegeronimo@protonmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T20:05:45Z","created_by":"Geronimo","updated_at":"2026-03-03T20:05:45Z"}
